name: Bwp Group
analysis: BWP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.9600, stop A$3.7917, target A$4.4649 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
